scripts.format: prettier --write AGENTS.md index.html package.json eslint.config.js vite.config.ts tsconfig.json tsconfig.app.json tsconfig.node.json 'src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}' 'plans/website/**/*.md'
scripts.format:check: prettier --check AGENTS.md index.html package.json eslint.config.js vite.config.ts tsconfig.json tsconfig.app.json tsconfig.node.json 'src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}' 'plans/website/**/*.md'
scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
